title: Mythicmon Map Sprites and other fixes
description: Ace's Cobblemon journeyMap sprites for mythical cobblemon and various text fixes
body:
# Notes
<center>Ace's Cobblemon journeyMap sprites for mythical cobblemon and various other Fixes</center>

-----------------------------
-----------------------------
### **contains**

- `Tm name fixes` 
- `biome name fixes`
- `most normal and shiny sprites to jorneymap minimap/map (custom texture mon show up as the default dots)`
- `glowing cobblemon ores and energy ore`
-----------------------------
-----------------------------
